overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic urban environment in Cyberpunk 2077, beginning in a rain-soaked park mixing traditional Japanese shrine elements with brutalist concrete infrastructure, progressing toward the massive Militech corporate tower, ascending its grand staircase, and entering a luxurious lobby before concluding inside the Hometown Deli. The atmosphere is dark and foggy with pervasive neon lighting and holographic advertisements.

walking toward the camera along the pathway

entered.detail: traditional Japanese stone lantern with carved details
white modern bench with person sitting
massive concrete highway structure overhead with support pillars
wooden structure with red paper lanterns hanging from the roof
tall white cylindrical light fixture with vertical glow

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a foggy park area beneath an elevated highway, mixing traditional Japanese architectural elements like stone lanterns and wooden shrines with brutalist concrete infrastructure. The camera walks forward along a paved path, passing pedestrians and illuminated vertical light posts, with holographic billboards visible in the distant fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza at base of Militech corporate tower

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the full height of the Militech tower against the foggy sky

agents.ego_description: approaching the Militech building and looking up at the tower facade before continuing toward the entrance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian wearing a jacket with green glowing elements walking toward the building entrance

entered.detail: massive brutalist corporate tower with illuminated Militech signage
wide concrete staircase leading up to the building entrance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a plaza at the base of the imposing Militech tower, a massive brutalist structure with glowing signage. The camera tilts up to emphasize the tower's height against the foggy night sky, then continues forward toward the grand exterior staircase, passing a pedestrian with glowing green jacket accents.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand exterior staircase leading to corporate lobby

events.description: beginning ascent of the wide exterior staircase toward the building entrance
reaching the top of the stairs and approaching the entrance doors

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide marble staircase toward the building entrance, passing pedestrians moving in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: descending the stairs carrying a glowing pink umbrella
ascending the stairs ahead of the camera

entered.detail: large digital display showing advertisements above the entrance doors
polished marble cladding on the building exterior flanking the stairs

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a grand exterior staircase flanked by marble walls and illuminated by vertical light posts. A pedestrian with a glowing pink umbrella descends past the camera, while another figure climbs ahead. The segment ends as the camera reaches the top of the stairs, approaching the entrance with a large digital screen above.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury corporate lobby with digital advertising and lounge seating

events.description: entering the indoor corporate lobby from the exterior stairs
turning right to walk past the circular lounge seating area

agents.ego_description: walking through the spacious marble lobby, observing digital advertisements and people seated in the lounge area

notable_agents.action: group of corporate workers sitting in circular seating area conversing

entered.detail: glowing rectangular panels embedded in the marble floor displaying video advertisements
massive digital screen displaying Arasaka corporate advertisements
modern circular seating pods with people resting
entrance to the Hometown Deli with illuminated red neon signage
decorative trees with golden foliage placed in the lobby

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a luxurious corporate lobby with polished marble floors featuring embedded digital advertising screens. The space is filled with ambient lighting, large wall-mounted billboards for Arasaka, and modern circular seating areas where people are gathered. The camera walks past decorative indoor trees toward the Hometown Deli entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: upscale deli restaurant interior with counter service

events.description: entering the Hometown Deli from the corporate lobby

agents.ego_description: walking into the deli past the entrance and moving toward the counter area, observing customers and staff

notable_agents.action: customer in orange shirt standing at the deli counter ordering food
person in brown suit walking past the entrance area

entered.detail: long service counter with staff behind and menu displays above
multiple screens above the counter displaying food items and prices
green illuminated bar stools lined up along the counter
wooden seating furniture in the waiting area

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the Hometown Deli, transitioning from the bright lobby to a more intimate interior space with dark wood and marble finishes. The deli features a long service counter with digital menu screens, illuminated bar stools, and customers ordering food. The camera moves through the space, passing wooden benches and observing the restaurant's interior layout.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a foggy, eclectic park through the imposing architecture of a corporate monolith and into a cozy urban eatery. It begins beneath an elevated highway where traditional Japanese shrines blend with brutalist concrete, moving along a paved path past holographic billboards shimmering in the mist. As the camera emerges into a wide plaza, the view tilts upward to capture the massive scale of the Militech tower before ascending a grand marble staircase flanked by glowing light posts and passing pedestrians. The scene then shifts into a luxurious corporate lobby characterized by polished floors and embedded digital screens, gliding past Arasaka advertisements and indoor greenery. Finally, the camera transitions from the bright, open lobby into the intimate interior of the Hometown Deli, moving through a space of dark wood and marble finishes toward the service counter and digital menus.
